problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Default. Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
